'''ân-r-v''' ('''kanarav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whitesplain|whitesplain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whitesplain|whitesplain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-r-v
|-
! Lemma
| kanarav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinarav|thinarav]] || [[word:jinarav|jinarav]] || [[word:shinarav|shinarav]] || [[word:kinarav|kinarav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunarav|thuthunarav]] || [[word:jujunarav|jujunarav]] || [[word:shushunarav|shushunarav]] || [[word:kukunarav|kukunarav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunarav|thunarav]] || [[word:junarav|junarav]] || [[word:shunarav|shunarav]] || [[word:kunarav|kunarav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunarav|thunarav]] || [[word:junarav|junarav]] || [[word:shunarav|shunarav]] || [[word:kunarav|kunarav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenarav|thenarav]] || [[word:jenarav|jenarav]] || [[word:shenarav|shenarav]] || [[word:kenarav|kenarav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonarav|thothonarav]] || [[word:jojonarav|jojonarav]] || [[word:shoshonarav|shoshonarav]] || [[word:kokonarav|kokonarav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonarav|thonarav]] || [[word:jonarav|jonarav]] || [[word:shonarav|shonarav]] || [[word:konarav|konarav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonarav|thonarav]] || [[word:jonarav|jonarav]] || [[word:shonarav|shonarav]] || [[word:konarav|konarav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnarav|thĂŠnarav]] || [[word:jĂŠnarav|jĂŠnarav]] || [[word:shĂŠnarav|shĂŠnarav]] || [[word:kĂŠnarav|kĂŠnarav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanarav|thathanarav]] || [[word:jajanarav|jajanarav]] || [[word:shashanarav|shashanarav]] || [[word:kakanarav|kakanarav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanarav|thanarav]] || [[word:janarav|janarav]] || [[word:shanarav|shanarav]] || [[word:kanarav|kanarav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanarav|thanarav]] || [[word:janarav|janarav]] || [[word:shanarav|shanarav]] || [[word:kanarav|kanarav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanarav|shanarav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanarav|goshanarav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanarav|gokishanarav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanaravnĂŒ|shanaravnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanaravnknĂŒ|goshanaravnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanaravnĂŒ|gokishanaravnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanaravshĂ«|shanaravshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanaravnkshĂ«|goshanaravnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanaravshĂ«|gokishanaravshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanaravro|shanaravro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanaravnkro|goshanaravnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanaravro|gokishanaravro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanaravmu|shanaravmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanaravnkmu|goshanaravnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanaravmu|gokishanaravmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanaravsher|shanaravsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanaravnksher|goshanaravnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanaravsher|gokishanaravsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanaravng|shanaravng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanaravnkng|goshanaravnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanaravng|gokishanaravng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanaravya|shanaravya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanaravnkya|goshanaravnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanaravya|gokishanaravya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanaravyam|shanaravyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanaravnkyam|goshanaravnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanaravyam|gokishanaravyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanaravnĂŒshĂ«|shanaravnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanaravnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanaravnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanaravnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanaravnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanaravnĂŒro|shanaravnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanaravnknĂŒro|goshanaravnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanaravnĂŒro|gokishanaravnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanaravnĂŒmu|shanaravnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanaravnknĂŒmu|goshanaravnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanaravnĂŒmu|gokishanaravnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanaravshĂ«nĂŒ|shanaravshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanaravnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanaravnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanaravshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanaravshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanaravshĂ«ro|shanaravshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanaravnkshĂ«ro|goshanaravnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanaravshĂ«ro|gokishanaravshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanaravshĂ«mu|shanaravshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanaravnkshĂ«mu|goshanaravnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanaravshĂ«mu|gokishanaravshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanaravronĂŒ|shanaravronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanaravnkronĂŒ|goshanaravnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanaravronĂŒ|gokishanaravronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanaravroshĂ«|shanaravroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanaravnkroshĂ«|goshanaravnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanaravroshĂ«|gokishanaravroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanaravromu|shanaravromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanaravnkromu|goshanaravnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanaravromu|gokishanaravromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanaravmunĂŒ|shanaravmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanaravnkmunĂŒ|goshanaravnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanaravmunĂŒ|gokishanaravmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanaravmushĂ«|shanaravmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanaravnkmushĂ«|goshanaravnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanaravmushĂ«|gokishanaravmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanaravmuro|shanaravmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanaravnkmuro|goshanaravnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanaravmuro|gokishanaravmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
